# HEARTBEAT.md — Task Checklist

# Keep this file empty (or with only comments/headers) to skip heartbeat API calls.
# Add tasks below — the agent reads this each heartbeat and follows it strictly.

# This file is just WHAT to check.

- Curate memory: promote old dailies, prune stale pointers
- Review bootstrap files for staleness
